strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud, meeting the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq, plus entrepreneurial track record founding GISCollective
Demonstrated builder fluency across a wide stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, DLang, Docker) with open-source output and public conference talks
concerns: AI involvement is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward); no demonstrated AI products or platforms at meaningful scale prior to that
Career history is purely individual-contributor development with no evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and the cloud experience is application-level (AWS CDK for one product team) rather than platform or infrastructure strategy
response.justification: Bogdan brings solid engineering breadth and just clears the years-of-experience bar, but the role demands a recognized AI authority who can operate at director level—advising strategic customers, shaping cloud platform roadmaps, and inspiring large organizations through demonstrated AI product expertise. His AI work is limited to a few months of agent tooling at a small firm, his leadership history is strictly hands-on IC, and there is no evidence of the executive-facing influence or cloud-platform strategy experience the position requires.
